_README: Per-course page map for the shared Brightspace pusher (~/repos/claude-config/tools/brightspace_push.py). Copy this into the course repo as scripts/brightspace_pages.json (gitignored there), and fill each value with that page's Brightspace EDIT url (open the topic, click Edit, copy the address-bar URL). The KEY matches the rendered html filename without .html in that course's --html-dir. Delete this _README line and any rows you do not use.
